Class TestCases

java.lang.Object
testCases.TestCases
public class TestCases extends Object
Test Cases for the Student Discussion System (Task 3). Covers all 15 test cases from Test Cases PDF: Post 1-5, Reply 1-5, Storage 1-5. Run main() to execute all tests and see PASS/FAIL. Each method documents the test case and satisfies the requirement stated in the PDF.
